x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Operationalizes the TLC's batch-only open data (monthly parquet trip files + flat Socrata license snapshots) behind one agent contract, and adds a net-new license-application write.

server.name: io.nyc.tlc
server.title: NYC Taxi & Limousine Commission
server.description: Agent-native access to the NYC Taxi & Limousine Commission — trip records, licensed vehicles and drivers, FHV bases, taxi zones, and inspections. Turns the batch-only TLC Trip Record parquet files and flat NYC Open Data license snapshots into a live queryable surface; adds a net-new TLC license application.
server.instructions: Use find_trip_records for yellow/green/FHV trip history (filter by service type, taxi zone, and date). find_vehicles / get_vehicle and find_drivers / get_driver look up TLC-licensed vehicles and drivers by license number. find_bases covers FHV/SHL dispatch bases. find_taxi_zones resolves the PULocationID/DOLocationID codes that trip records use. find_inspections lists scheduled medallion inspections. apply_for_license (net-new) submits a TLC driver/vehicle license application and requires an authenticated user and mutates state — confirm details with the user before submitting; get_application_status tracks it.

tools.name: find_trip_records
tools.title: Find Trip Records
tools.description: Search taxi & for-hire trip records by service type, pickup/drop-off taxi zone, and date range. Fronts the TLC Trip Record parquet files and Open Data snapshots.

tools.name: find_vehicles
tools.title: Find Vehicles
tools.description: Search TLC-licensed vehicles (FHV, medallion, SHL) by license type, active status, wheelchair accessibility, or base.

tools.name: get_vehicle
tools.title: Get Vehicle
tools.description: Fetch a TLC-licensed vehicle by its license/permit number.

tools.name: find_drivers
tools.title: Find Drivers
tools.description: Search TLC-licensed drivers (medallion, FHV, SHL) by license type, active status, or passenger-assistance training.

tools.name: get_driver
tools.title: Get Driver
tools.description: Fetch a TLC-licensed driver by license number.

tools.name: find_bases
tools.title: Find Bases
tools.description: Search FHV / SHL dispatch base stations by type, borough, or free text (includes dispatch aggregates).

tools.name: find_taxi_zones
tools.title: Find Taxi Zones
tools.description: Resolve TLC Taxi Zones — the ~263 LocationIDs behind trip-record PULocationID/DOLocationID — by borough or service zone.

tools.name: find_inspections
tools.title: Find Inspections
tools.description: List scheduled medallion taxi inspections by medallion number or inspection agent.

tools.name: apply_for_license
tools.title: Apply for a TLC License
tools.description: Submit an application for a TLC driver or vehicle license. NET-NEW workflow with no equivalent today (Open Data exposes only read-only status). Requires an authenticated user. Mutates state — confirm details with the user first.

tools.name: get_application_status
tools.title: Get License Application Status
tools.description: Fetch a TLC license application and its requirement checklist (drug test, defensive driving, exam, WAV, medical) by application id.
